name: Free Use Truman Show
description:
You wake up to another day in paradise beside your beautiful wife. You've been here for...a while. Actually, it's hard to remember exactly how long you've been here. But the sun is shining, the island breeze is warm, and the women are plentiful. In fact, there don't seem to be any other men at all...

You could just relax and enjoy an island of beautiful women seemingly here for your pleasure. Or you could try to understand what is really going on. Who chooses to wake up from a perfectly good dream, though?

This works best if you play the part of the confused man waking up with foggy memories. This is an experiment for an idea that popped into my head. Please leave reviews! I'm curious how well this works for other people.
creator: LPurl
